title: lycianthes biflora var. mollissima
intro: Lycianthes biflora var. mollissima, also known as the soft-leaf purple passion flower, is a variety of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family, native to the Andes mountains. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycianthes biflora var. mollissima include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm the safety and efficacy of these uses.
